title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 276.611 - Dealers to register with director
text:
276.611.  Dealers to register with director. — Any person engaged in the business of buying, selling, or exchanging in commerce livestock shall be registered annually with the director.  Registration shall be made on forms provided by the director.
(L. 1987 H.B. 368, A.L. 1989 H.B. 362)
